title: Max Area of Island
problem_statement: Return the size of the largest island in a binary grid, where islands are connected horizontally or vertically.

examples.explanation: The largest connected island includes five 1s.

intuition: Use DFS/BFS to traverse each island and count contiguous land cells.

approaches.name: DFS flood-fill
approaches.description: Explore each unvisited land cell recursively, mark visited cells, and compute area size.
approaches.why_not: Recursive DFS is straightforward; BFS is also valid but does not change complexity.

interview_qa.a: To avoid counting the same land cell multiple times and to prevent infinite recursion.
Yes, BFS also traverses connected components level by level and computes area size.
